Credible BD Lighting
Let's go build up bright future. Quality first without compromise.
Click Here
Credible BD Engineering
Let's go build up bright future. Quality first without compromise.
Click Here
Previous
Next
Who We Are

About Credible

Credible BD is involved with a variety of Industrial Lights and electrical works. Our goal is to look forward a sustainable and innovative technology for our next generation. Credible BD Lighting has 9 years of experience in lighting and electrical business. In these years we have demonstrated a level of integrity and stability that has lead us to continuous relationship with our clients.
More Information
Why Choose Us
Our product range is exclusive. We are trusted to provide a full range of engineering and lighting related services. We have a wide range of variety so customers have wide liberty to decide from alternatives. In practical, Credible is moving to expand its activities to production in a big scale. We have already started to provide Transformer, Panel Board, Cable Tray, Solar System, DB board, PFI panel and other electrical products.
More Information

Saving energy is becoming more and more important.

Energy analyzers also make it possible to keep the problem of harmonic pollution under close control.
More Information

Lighting Solution

Import, Customized, Manufacturing

Lighting Solution

Year Of Experience

Credible Lighting World

LED Flood light
DESCRIPTION:
  • Model : CBLFLR54 / CBLFL- FTM / CBLFUL-SL
  • Total Watt : 50W/100W/150W/200W/300W/400W/500W/800W/1000W
  • LED Type : COB/SMD
  • Voltage : AC 85 – 265V, 50/60HZ
  • Luminous Flux : 110lm/w / 130lm/w / 140lm/w
  • IP Rating : IP66
  • Service Life : 5000Hrs
  • Color Temperature : White/Warm/Cool White
  • Power Factor : >0.98
  • CCT : 3000K – 6500K
  • CRI : >80ra
  • Lumen Maintenance : 98% Up to 1000Hrs
  • Driver : Isolated
  • Led Chips : Bridgelux
  • CCT : 3500K – 7000K
  • Housing : Die -Casting Aluminum
  • Body Color : Black/Gray
  • Beam Angle : 120°
  • Working Temperature : 30-55°C
  • Storage Temperature : 45-85°C
  • Surge Protection : 6KV
  • LED Chips Brand : Credible/Epistar
  • LED Driver Brand : Cridible/Mean Well
  • Fixture : Dia-cast Aluminum
  • Origin : China
  • Certification : CE & RoHS
APPLICATION:
ʘ Facade Lightings     ʘ OutDoor Light ʘ Parking Areas           ʘ Landscapes ʘ Residenttial Areas   ʘ Back Yards ʘ Shopping Malls        ʘ Shopping Malls ʘ Sport Lightings        ʘ Land Marks
LED High Bay Light
DESCRIPTION:
  • Model : CBLHB-R-200 / CBLHB-UFO / CBLHL-IP-65
  • Total Watt : 50W/100W/150W/200W/250W/300W/400W/500W/600W/800W/1000W
  • LED Type : COB/SMD
  • Voltage : AC 85 – 265V, 50/60HZ
  • Luminous Flux : 120lm/w / 130lm/w / 140lm/w
  • IP Rating : IP64 / IP65 / IP66
  • Service Life : 5000Hrs
  • Color Temperature : White/Warm/Cool White
  • Power Factor : >0.98
  • CCT : 3000K – 6500K
  • CRI : >80ra
  • Lumen Maintenance : 98% Up to 1000Hrs
  • Driver : Isolated
  • Led Chips : Bridgelux
  • CCT : 3500K – 7000K
  • Housing : Die -Casting Aluminum
  • Body Color : Black/Gray
  • Beam Angle : 120°
  • Working Temperature : 30-55°C
  • Storage Temperature : 45-85°C
  • Surge Protection : 6KV
  • LED Chips Brand : Credible/Epistar
  • LED Driver Brand : Cridible/Mean Well
  • Fixture : Dia-cast Aluminum
  • Origin : China
  • Certification : CE & RoHS
Installation : Loop & Hook hanging / Wall mount / Surface mount / Rack mount
Features & Application :
ʘ Facade Lightings     ʘ OutDoor Light ʘ Parking Areas           ʘ Landscapes ʘ Residenttial Areas    ʘ Back Yards ʘ Shopping Malls        ʘ Sport Lightings        ʘ Land Marks
LED Street Light

 

DESCRIPTION:
  • Model : CBLSL-R-200 / CBLSL-SMD
  • Total Watt : 40W/50W/60W/80W/100W/120W/150W/1600W/180W/200W
  • LED Type : COB
  • Voltage : AC 85 – 265V, 50/60HZ
  • Luminous Flux : 120lm/w / 140lm/w
  • IP Rating :  IP65
  • Service Life : 5000Hrs
  • Color Temperature : White/Natural/White/Warm/Yellow
  • Power Factor : >0.98
  • CCT : 3000K – 6500K
  • CRI : >80ra
  • Lumen Maintenance : 98% Up to 1000Hrs
  • Driver : Isolated
  • Led Chips : Bridgelux
  • CCT : 3500K – 7000K
  • Housing : Die -Casting Aluminum
  • Body Color : Black/Gray
  • Beam Angle : 120°
  • Working Temperature : 30-55°C
  • Storage Temperature : 45-85°C
  • Surge Protection : 6KV
  • LED Chips Brand : Credible/Epistar
  • LED Driver Brand : Cridible/Mean Well
  • Fixture : Dia-cast Aluminum
  • Origin : China
  • Certification : CE & RoHS
Application :

Used for highway,main road, pavement street, residential road, branch road, rural roads, Square, Parking Lots, Gardens, Industrial roads and indoor high space Lighting, factories etc.
